titleStmt.title: SII 10.191: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 191. (A.R. No. 308 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR IN THE TEMPLE OF SVARṆĒŚVARA, GANAPAVARAM, BHIMAVARAM TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Ś. [10]96.

summary.p: States that Vēṅgi-Mallidēvarāja's son, Gōkarāja, who belonged to the family of Yuddhamalla and was lord of the six-thousand country made a gift of 30 cows to the temple of Svarṇēśvara of Padminīpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti stutyasamadhigatapaṁcamahāśa
bda mahāmaṇḍalēśvara bhaṭṭipuravarādhī
śvara mānavyasagōtra hārītaputrasōma
vaṁśā¨rnnavacaṁdra satyahariścaṁdra dalita
ripuda¨rppa rājakanda¨rppa yuddhamallavaṁśa
samuddharaṇa bhayalōbhasaṁharaṇa ṣaṭsa
hasrāvanīnāyaka vairibhayadāyaka śrī
manmallēśvara mahādēva divyaśrīpādapadmā
rādhaka parabalasādhaka nāmādisamasta
praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara
vēṁgimallidēvarājukoḍku gōkarājulu śaka
vaṣaṁbulu 1096 gu nēṁṭi yāṣāṭhakriṣṇa
yēkādaśiyu budhavāramunāṇṭi dakṣi
ṇāyanasaṁkrāṁtinimityamuna śrīma

tu padminīpuramuna śrīsva¨rnīśvaramahādē
varaku nakhaṇḍava¨rttidīpamunaku niccina
nurabhulu 30 vīniṁ jēkoni tōṁkala ko
bōyuṁḍu putrānupautrikamugā sā
niyaṁbāḍi nityamāneṇḍu nēyi naḍapa
ṁgalavāru śrīvaṁgipakācāri
Digital edition of SII 10.191 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
